findings: Recent labeled scans showed legacy decision_score ranking underperformed badly.
Peak+Overheat+ML>=30 patterns were strong positive pockets.
Rising without volume expansion and RSI_DIV patterns were consistent weak pockets.
Historical ml_prob outliers above 100 existed in DB snapshots and needed sanitization.
code_changes: Reweighted decision_score toward alpha/model and away from whale over-dependence.
Added edge adjustment for Peak+Overheat+ModelConfirm and penalties for weak chase / RSI_DIV.
Reduced outdated F4-style bonus in rank adjustment.
Clamped ml_prob writes to 0..100 in DB manager.
